title: Conexa Saúde - Brazilian Telemedicine Platform
problem: Before COVID-19, telemedicine was limited in Brazil. Patients in remote areas lacked specialist access. COVID-19 accelerated adoption but fragmented solutions emerged. No unified platform connecting all healthcare stakeholders.
solution: Comprehensive telemedicine platform connecting patients, doctors, clinics, and labs. Video consultations, digital prescriptions, appointment scheduling, health records. B2B2C model through corporate health plans and insurance partnerships.
technology: Video conferencing, EMR integration, digital prescription system, mobile app, web platform
target_customer: Health insurance companies, corporations (employee health), individual physicians, patients
regulatory_notes: CFM (Conselho Federal de Medicina) telemedicine regulations, ANS compliance
varden_fit: COMPETITOR - Directly competes with Varden's telemedicine capabilities. Study their B2B2C model. Potential acquisition target if Varden scales in Brazil.
notes: Brazil's Kry/Docplanner equivalent. Strong market position. Varden should differentiate by focusing on infrastructure/admin tools rather than competing head-on.
